lineage.method: SP-J regime-conditional alpha architecture: base = v6_h10d (lsk3 + F-cascade w=0.025); regime-conditional F1 addition (trend_up: 0, rotation_high_vol: +0.025, drawdown_rebound: +0.030). Regime label sourced from production-realistic trailing W3.5 v2 components (BTC vol regime quantile + trailing_30d / trailing_60d universe mean return). NO LOOKAHEAD.

sp_j_convergent_evidence_2026_04_30.source_1_sp_f_cycle_non_additivity: F1 G6-passes admission (residual IC +0.040 t=+7.24 vs lsk3+F08 at h10d) but cycle non-additive at constant weight when stacked on F-cascade.
sp_j_convergent_evidence_2026_04_30.source_2_tt_smooth_per_regime: drawdown_rebound IC -0.033 t=-3.55 vs trend_up IC=0.000. Regime-fragile factor pattern.
sp_j_convergent_evidence_2026_04_30.source_3_momentum_decay_per_regime: rotation_high_vol IC +0.075 t=+3.01 (sign-flipped strong) vs other regimes ~0.
sp_j_convergent_evidence_2026_04_30.source_4_dual_horizon_ensemble: Pearson +0.843 same-sign 87.5% confirms shared alpha source. v6_h10d advantage isolated to drawdown_rebound (h5d -3.37 vs h10d +2.17 sharpe).
sp_j_convergent_evidence_2026_04_30.source_5_w35_v2_overlay_precedent: trailing_universe_mean_return throttle works specifically because it overlaps lsk3 losing days. Regime-conditional pattern empirically validated at overlay layer.

regime_classifier_v10.lookahead_status: NO LOOKAHEAD — uses trailing_30d/60d universe mean return + BTC vol regime quantile, all >=10 days lagged

f1_regime_weights_2026_04_30.rationale: F1 weight = 0 in trend_up because v9 cycle showed F1 cycle-flat at constant weight. Rotation regime weight matches v9 locked weight w=+0.015 scaled up to reflect single-regime concentration. Drawdown_rebound weight slightly higher because F-cascade mean-reversion alpha is strongest in cascade-recovery period (matches SP-A doc §E.12 mechanism).

pre_registered_decision_criteria.PROMOTE: walk_forward_median_oos_sharpe > v6_h10d +2.832 AND positive_regime_fraction >= 0.667 AND worst_regime_median_oos_sharpe >= -2.828 (sqrt-scaled floor)
pre_registered_decision_criteria.AT_PAR: walk_forward_median_oos_sharpe within v6_h10d +/- 0.10 AND regime breadth preserved
pre_registered_decision_criteria.DECLINE: walk_forward_median_oos_sharpe < v6_h10d -0.10 OR regime worst breaks -2.828 floor

thesis_profile.market_mechanism: SP-J regime-conditional alpha architecture. Base score = v6_h10d (lsk3 + F-cascade w=0.025). Regime-conditional F1 funding_intraday_dispersion_30d term: trend_up regime: 0; rotation_high_vol regime: +0.025; drawdown_rebound regime: +0.030. Regime label from production-realistic trailing W3.5 v2 components (no lookahead). 5 convergent investigations motivate this architecture: SP-F cycle non-additivity + tt_smooth_5/momentum_decay regime-fragility + dual-horizon ensemble shared alpha + W3.5 v2 overlay precedent.
thesis_profile.directional_claim: Same long-short top-3 perp construction. Score = v6_h10d base + regime-conditional F1. F1 active only in regimes where prior deep dives showed F1/momentum_decay alpha activation (rotation_high_vol, drawdown_rebound). Stacked with W3.5 v2 regime-gating overlay. Pre-registered: PROMOTE if walk-forward median > +2.832 AND positive_regime_fraction >= 2/3 AND no regime worst breaks -2.828; AT-PAR if metrics within +/- 0.10; DECLINE otherwise.
thesis_profile.factor_formula: base = -0.20*z(iv_smooth_60) -0.10*z(rv_5) +0.18*z(dh_60) +0.15*z(dh_5) -0.07*z(tt_smooth_5) -0.10*z(liquidity_stress_qv_iv) -0.06*z(momentum_decay_5_20) +0.05*z(taker_imb_dispersion) -0.05*z(quality_funding_oi) +0.10*z(downside_upside_vol_ratio_30) +0.07*z(funding_basis_residual_implied_repo_30) +0.025*z(liq_cascade_recency_score_5d); regime_addition = (regime==drawdown_rebound)*0.030 + (regime==rotation_high_vol)*0.025; raw = base + regime_addition * z(funding_intraday_dispersion_30d); final_score = tanh((percentile_rank(raw)-0.5)*1.80); target_weight_per_name = (long_leverage/top_K - short_leverage/bottom_K) * regime_gating_v2_multiplier(t)

experimental_reason: SP-J regime-conditional architecture cycle test pending. Pre-registered decision criteria: PROMOTE if walk-forward median > v6_h10d +2.832 with regime breadth preserved; AT-PAR if metrics within +/- 0.10; DECLINE otherwise. Either outcome is informative — PROMOTE establishes regime-conditional architecture as Stage-2 primitive; DECLINE confirms F1 alpha is fundamentally F-cascade-overlapping (cycle non-additivity is not architecture-driven).
